form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after four months sat on the speed and boxed on steadily 3rd of 8 at this track on March 19 over 302m, neck behind Rr Easy Favorite with 56kg at $3. Previously second-up got back early 8th of 10 at this track on April 23 over 302m, 2.25 len behind Dynasty Returns with 56kg at $21.60. Solid top-three hope.

form.formComment: He is resuming after a five-and-a-half months break. Finished off last campaign second of 9 at Will Rogers Downs October 27 over 366m, 1.0 len behind Tux Hard Shop with 56.5kg at $91.20. On debut eighth of 10 at Retama Park July 3 over 274m, 5.5 len behind Inflation with 56kg at $16.70. Happy to work around.
